scripts.title: POV: Your business runs itself

scripts.title: Things AI agents can do that most people don't know
scripts.script:
Things AI agents can do that most people don't know:
1. Build your entire website from scratch [show website generating]
2. Write and publish blog posts daily [show blog posts]
3. Create marketing videos and thumbnails [show assets]
4. Manage all your social media [show dashboard]
5. Handle customer service 24/7 [show chatbot]
6. Generate revenue reports weekly [show charts]
...and it costs less than one employee.
[Text: 'Link in bio for free trial']

scripts.title: My morning routine as an AI-powered business owner
scripts.script:
My morning routine as a business owner:
6:00 AM — Wake up naturally (no alarm) ☕
6:15 AM — Check AI dashboard — everything's running
6:20 AM — Review overnight metrics — 12 new leads
6:25 AM — Approve AI-generated content for the day
6:30 AM — Done. Time for yoga.
The AI handles the rest.
[Text: '@myai — automation that actually works']
scripts.music_suggestion: Chill morning vibe / aesthetic routine audio

scripts.title: Hiring an employee vs. using AI 🤖
scripts.script:
Hiring an employee:
❌ $4,000/month salary
❌ 40 hours/week max
❌ Sick days, vacations
❌ Training needed

Using myAI:
✅ $399/month
✅ Works 24/7/365
✅ Never calls in sick
✅ Self-learning

The choice is obvious.
[Text: 'Start free trial — link in bio']

scripts.title: Watch AI build a website in 60 seconds
scripts.script:
[Screen recording with timer overlay]
0:00 — Run the command: python run.py
0:10 — Agent starts executing tasks from queue
0:20 — Landing page generated with full design
0:30 — Blog posts created and published
0:40 — Pricing page with 3 tiers
0:50 — Email templates generated

1:00 — Done. Full business website. From zero.
[Text: 'This is myAI. Link in bio.']
